title: Feature Specification: Mental Health Platform — Patient Intake, Psychiatrist Matching & Personalized Care
summary: Full feature specification for patient onboarding, psychiatrist matching, appointment booking, long-term care profiles, and personalized WhatsApp notifications on an India-market mental health platform.
notes: Manifest declared SPEC; content also exhibits strong PRD signals (user stories with Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, priority ratings, edge cases). Classified as SPEC per manifest authority. Synthesizer should extract both requirements and technical constraints from this document.
